headline: Is Edison International Stock Outperforming the Dow?
summary: While Edison International has outperformed the Dow Jones Industrial over the past year, analysts remain cautiously optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: Edison International (EIX) Downgraded to ‘Sell’
summary: Edison International (NYSE:EIX) is included among the 11 Best Utility Stocks to Buy for Dividends in 2026.
